events.title: King Woman
events.description: Heavy, ethereal rock band King Woman at Great American Music Hall. Doors at 7 PM.

events.title: Wynton Marsalis Septet
events.cost_notes: $45–$90 typical, check site for exact pricing
events.description: Wynton Marsalis leads his septet as part of SFJAZZ's 2026 Summer Sessions, a six-week concert series celebrating musical traditions across the Americas.

events.title: ICA SF: Tara Donovan — Stratagems
events.description: Site-specific solo exhibition by Tara Donovan, on view through July 31 — closing in the next two weeks. Also on view: Jeffrey Gibson's 'This Burning World' and Rupy C. Tut's 'The Picnic Potluck'.

events.title: Memory Cradle — Last Chance
events.description: Final days for this exhibition exploring memory, material, and personal archive — closes July 18. Wed–Sat 11am–5pm.

events.title: BATS Improv: Hitchcock Performance Lab (Student Show)
events.description: BATS student performance lab: genre-driven improvisation inspired by Hitchcock suspense tropes. Fort Mason Center, Building B.

events.title: People in Plazas – Free Lunchtime Music
events.description: Free outdoor lunchtime concerts at plazas on and near Market Street. Runs Tuesdays and Thursdays through September 2026.

events.title: Lettuce
events.description: Funk/groove veterans Lettuce play a multi-night run (July 16–19) as part of SFJAZZ's 2026 Summer Sessions.

events.title: Dead Souls: Joy Division Tribute
events.description: Dead Souls, San Francisco's acclaimed Joy Division and New Order tribute band. Doors at 8 PM.

events.title: Futurebirds
events.description: Athens, GA indie rock band Futurebirds at The Chapel. Doors at 8 PM.

events.title: LOVE SUPREME Summer Day Party
events.description: LOVE SUPREME Summer Day Party Series at The Chapel — afternoon dance party with DJ sets. All ages. 2 PM.

events.title: Dance Fridays – Salsa & Bachata
events.description: Weekly SF Latin dance party: beginner lessons at 7:45 PM, then social dancing until 1:30 AM across two rooms. 21+.

events.title: Tommy Brennan
events.description: Stand-up comedian Tommy Brennan performs at Punch Line SF, 444 Battery St.

events.title: James McMurtry
events.description: Veteran Texas singer-songwriter James McMurtry, known for sharp, novelistic lyrics. Doors 8 PM.

events.title: Ringo Deathstarr — Soundwall Festival 2026
events.description: Shoegaze veterans Ringo Deathstarr headline a Soundwall Festival 2026 bill with Suzy Clue, Her New Knife, Blossom, Starling, and Misandrist. Doors 5 PM.

events.title: Big Brave & Cel Genesis
events.description: Montreal experimental heavy trio Big Brave co-headlines with Cel Genesis at Bottom of the Hill.

events.title: Monthly El Rio
events.description: El Rio's recurring monthly gathering on the venue's iconic outdoor patio — live music, DJs, and the neighborhood's long-running queer bar scene.

events.title: SF Comedy Showcase
events.description: Rotating lineup of stand-up comedians at Punch Line SF's regular showcase night.

events.title: Parts and Labor, evicshen, HLLLYH
events.description: Three-band experimental/noise-rock bill at Bottom of the Hill.
